{{Quote|These days, they let practically anyone with a ticket-chip on board.|Tyew Fordrod|<ref name="RM" />}}
'''Tyew Fordrod''' was a snobbish member of the [[Color/Legends|yellow]]-skinned [[Polosich]] [[Species/Legends|species]], and was a passenger aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] when it was [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|attacked]] by the [[Riders of the Maelstrom]].

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
